Three folders:

field_1_training/ : Input dataset for the Augmenter
    -- positive/ : Sliced tiles containing images of proxy meteorites in the field
    -- negative/ : Silced tile images of the field without any proxy meteorites

raw_flight_1/ : Drone SD card dump, used as input for the main pipeline

flight_1_results/ : Output directory for results (Generated by the Swarm)
    -- thumbnails/ : Cropped images created by the Cartographer
    -- verified_candidates.csv : Data file generated by the Cartographer
    -- verified_candidates.kml : Google Earth map generated by the Cartographer
    -- final_deployment.csv : (Generated by the Auditor UI)
